name: libnumber-bytes-human-perl
title: libnumber-bytes-human-perl
summary: module to convert byte count to human readable format and back
description:
module to convert byte count to human readable format and back
Number::Bytes::Human provides a formatter which turns byte counts to
usual readable format, like '2.0K' or '3.1GiB', as well as a parser to
go the opposite way. It was inspired by the -h option of Unix utilities
like du and df for "human-readable" output.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnumber-bytes-human-perl because module to convert byte count to human readable format and back.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnumber-bytes-human-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnumber-bytes-human-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnumber-bytes-human-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
